requirement_topic.en: MASM Conformity Certification — National Market-Access Gate (no EAC; not an EAEU member)
requirement_topic.zh: MASM合格认证——国家市场准入门槛（无EAC；非欧亚经济联盟成员）
requirement_topic.zht: MASM合格認證——國家市場准入門檻（無EAC；非歐亞經濟聯盟成員）

summary.en: Mongolia operates a national conformity regime administered by MASM （Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology） for regulated products. Household refrigerating appliances are electrical consumer products and are expected to undergo MASM conformity certification referencing the applicable MNS standards — which adopt IEC 60335-2-24 （safety）, the CISPR 14 / IEC 61000 family （EMC）, and IEC 62552 （energy/performance measurement）. Critically, Mongolia is NOT a member of the Eurasian Economic Union （EAEU）: the EAC mark and the EAEU technical regulations （TR CU/TR EAEU） do NOT apply, and an EAC certificate is not a substitute for Mongolian conformity. There is no single combined mark equivalent to CE; conformity is demonstrated against the relevant MNS standards within MASM's procedures. Where the product contains a radio module, the Communications Regulatory Commission （CRC） handles radio type-approval separately.
summary.zh: 蒙古实行由MASM（蒙古标准计量署）管理的国家合格认证制度，适用于受监管产品。家用制冷器具属电气消费品，须进行MASM合格认证，参照适用的MNS标准——其采用IEC 60335-2-24（安全）、CISPR 14 / IEC 61000族（电磁兼容）及IEC 62552（能效/性能测量）。关键在于，蒙古非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员：EAC标志及欧亚经济联盟技术法规（TR CU/TR EAEU）不适用，EAC证书不能替代蒙古合格认证。不存在单一等同于CE的组合标志；合格须在MASM程序内对照相关MNS标准证明。产品含无线电模块时，由通信监管委员会（CRC）另行办理无线电型式批准。
summary.zht: 蒙古實行由MASM（蒙古標準計量署）管理的國家合格認證制度，適用於受監管產品。家用製冷器具屬電氣消費品，須進行MASM合格認證，參照適用的MNS標準——其採用IEC 60335-2-24（安全）、CISPR 14 / IEC 61000族（電磁相容）及IEC 62552（能效/性能測量）。關鍵在於，蒙古非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員：EAC標誌及歐亞經濟聯盟技術法規（TR CU/TR EAEU）不適用，EAC證書不能替代蒙古合格認證。不存在單一等同於CE的組合標誌；合格須在MASM程序內對照相關MNS標準證明。產品含無線電模組時，由通信監管委員會（CRC）另行辦理無線電型式批准。

standards_or_laws: MASM conformity certification regime — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology （national regulated-product certification）
MNS standards adopting IEC 60335-2-24 （safety）, CISPR 14 / IEC 61000 （EMC）, IEC 62552 （energy/performance）
Note: Mongolia is NOT an EAEU member — EAC mark / TR CU / TR EAEU do not apply
Communications Regulatory Commission （CRC） of Mongolia — radio type approval where applicable

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification （CCC） covering safety （GB 4706.13） and EMC （GB 4343.1） before sale, plus a separate China Energy Label （GB 12021.2）. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated bodies under SAMR. While CCC and the underlying GB standards trace to the same IEC/CISPR international basis used by Mongolia's MNS standards, a CCC certificate is a China-domestic conformity instrument and is not automatically recognised by MASM — a separate Mongolian conformity certification is required for market access.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并另需中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定机构在SAMR下管理。尽管CCC及底层GB标准溯源至与蒙古MNS标准相同的IEC/CISPR国际基础，CCC证书为中国国内合格工具，不被MASM自动承认——市场准入须另行完成蒙古合格认证。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並另需中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定機構在SAMR下管理。儘管CCC及底層GB標準溯源至與蒙古MNS標準相同的IEC/CISPR國際基礎，CCC證書為中國國內合格工具，不被MASM自動承認——市場准入須另行完成蒙古合格認證。

standards_or_laws: CCC （China Compulsory Certification） — safety （GB 4706.13） + EMC （GB 4343.1）; mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels （NDRC/SAMR）; based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must obtain Mongolian conformity certification through MASM; a CCC certificate alone does not grant Mongolian market access, and—because Mongolia is not an EAEU member—an EAC certificate is also not applicable. Key actions: （1） MASM conformity certification against the relevant MNS standards （safety/EMC/energy）, ideally leveraging IECEE CB Scheme reports given the shared IEC base to reduce re-testing; （2） confirm whether MASM accepts foreign test reports or requires testing/sampling via a MASM-recognised body; （3） declaration/marking and Mongolian-language product information per MASM and importer requirements; （4） separate CRC radio approval if the appliance has wireless connectivity. The strong upside: the shared IEC/CISPR standards and the matching 220/380 V 50 Hz grid mean the product itself usually needs no redesign — the gap is the national conformity procedure, not the engineering.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须通过MASM取得蒙古合格认证；仅凭CCC证书不能获得蒙古市场准入，且因蒙古非欧亚经济联盟成员，EAC证书亦不适用。关键行动：（1）对照相关MNS标准（安全/电磁兼容/能效）完成MASM合格认证，鉴于共享IEC基础宜借助IECEE CB体系报告以减少重新检测；（2）确认MASM是否接受境外检测报告或要求经MASM认可机构检测/抽样；（3）依MASM及进口商要求提供声明/标识及蒙古语产品信息；（4）若器具具无线连接功能，另须取得CRC无线电批准。重大利好：共享的IEC/CISPR标准及一致的220/380 V 50 Hz电网意味着产品本身通常无需重新设计——差距在于国家合格程序，而非工程。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須通過MASM取得蒙古合格認證；僅憑CCC證書不能獲得蒙古市場准入，且因蒙古非歐亞經濟聯盟成員，EAC證書亦不適用。關鍵行動：（1）對照相關MNS標準（安全/電磁相容/能效）完成MASM合格認證，鑑於共享IEC基礎宜借助IECEE CB體系報告以減少重新檢測；（2）確認MASM是否接受境外檢測報告或要求經MASM認可機構檢測/抽樣；（3）依MASM及進口商要求提供聲明/標識及蒙古語產品資訊；（4）若器具具無線連接功能，另須取得CRC無線電批准。重大利好：共享的IEC/CISPR標準及一致的220/380 V 50 Hz電網意味著產品本身通常無需重新設計——差距在於國家合格程序，而非工程。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MASM conformity certification required for regulated electrical products before placement on the Mongolian market; EAC/EAEU regime does NOT apply （Mongolia is not an EAEU member）
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification （safety + EMC） + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] MASM conformity certification is the national market-access gate for household refrigerators in Mongolia. CCC and EAC are both insufficient — Mongolia runs a national regime and is not an EAEU member. Because the MNS standards adopt the same IEC/CISPR base as China's GB standards and the 220/380 V 50 Hz grids match, the product rarely needs redesign; the effort is the MASM conformity procedure, best supported by IECEE CB Scheme reports. Add CRC radio approval for connected models.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] MASM合格认证是家用电冰箱进入蒙古的国家市场准入门槛。CCC和EAC均不足够——蒙古实行国家制度且非欧亚经济联盟成员。由于MNS标准采用与中国GB标准相同的IEC/CISPR基础且220/380 V 50 Hz电网一致，产品鲜少需要重新设计；工作量在于MASM合格程序，最好借助IECEE CB体系报告支持。联网型号须另加CRC无线电批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] MASM合格認證是家用電冰箱進入蒙古的國家市場准入門檻。CCC和EAC均不足夠——蒙古實行國家制度且非歐亞經濟聯盟成員。由於MNS標準採用與中國GB標準相同的IEC/CISPR基礎且220/380 V 50 Hz電網一致，產品鮮少需要重新設計；工作量在於MASM合格程序，最好借助IECEE CB體系報告支持。聯網型號須另加CRC無線電批准。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer / Local Representative + Customs (landlocked; rail/road entry)
requirement_topic.zh: 境内进口商／本地代表 + 海关（内陆国；铁路/公路入境）
requirement_topic.zht: 境內進口商／本地代表 + 海關（內陸國；鐵路/公路入境）

summary.en: Mongolia requires an in-country importer or locally established representative to place imported household appliances on the market, clear customs, and interface with MASM conformity certification and any energy-programme/labelling requirements. Mongolia is landlocked: goods from China typically enter by rail or road across the land border （there is no sea port）, which shapes logistics, lead times, and documentation. The local importer is the practical responsible party for: presenting conformity documentation to MASM/customs; arranging any required testing/sampling; ensuring Mongolian-language product information and labels; and handling import duties/VAT and customs clearance. While Mongolia's national regime does not impose an EU-style statutory 'authorised representative' mandate, in practice an established local importer/representative is the channel through which conformity, labelling, and customs obligations are met.
summary.zh: 蒙古要求由境内进口商或本地设立代表将进口家用器具投放市场、办理清关，并与MASM合格认证及任何能效计划/标识要求对接。蒙古为内陆国：来自中国的货物通常经铁路或公路跨越陆地边界入境（无海港），这影响物流、交期及文件。本地进口商为实际责任方，负责：向MASM/海关提交合格文件；安排任何所需检测/抽样；确保蒙古语产品信息和标签；以及处理进口关税/增值税和清关。虽然蒙古国家制度不施加欧盟式法定"授权代表"义务，但实践中已设立的本地进口商/代表是满足合格、标识及海关义务的渠道。
summary.zht: 蒙古要求由境內進口商或本地設立代表將進口家用器具投放市場、辦理清關，並與MASM合格認證及任何能效計劃/標識要求對接。蒙古為內陸國：來自中國的貨物通常經鐵路或公路跨越陸地邊界入境（無海港），這影響物流、交期及文件。本地進口商為實際責任方，負責：向MASM/海關提交合格文件；安排任何所需檢測/抽樣；確保蒙古語產品資訊和標籤；以及處理進口關稅/增值稅和清關。雖然蒙古國家制度不施加歐盟式法定「授權代表」義務，但實踐中已設立的本地進口商/代表是滿足合格、標識及海關義務的渠道。

standards_or_laws: Mongolian customs and import requirements — in-country importer/representative for customs clearance and market placement
MASM conformity documentation — presented via the local importer at import/clearance
Land-border entry — rail/road from China （Mongolia is landlocked; no sea port）

summary.en: For China's domestic market, the CCC certificate holder / domestic manufacturer or its appointed sales entity is the responsible party for placing products on the market; there is no concept of a foreign in-country importer because the goods are domestic. Chinese export manufacturers typically appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis. There is no Chinese statutory obligation mirroring Mongolia's practical reliance on a local importer/representative for conformity presentation and customs clearance in the destination country; this is a destination-market requirement that the exporter must satisfy through its Mongolian importer.
summary.zh: 对于中国国内市场，CCC证书持有人/国内制造商或其指定销售实体为产品投放市场的责任方；由于货物为国内货物，不存在境外境内进口商的概念。中国出口制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司。中国没有与蒙古在目的国实际依赖本地进口商/代表进行合格文件提交及清关相对应的法定义务；这是出口商须通过其蒙古进口商满足的目的地市场要求。
summary.zht: 對於中國國內市場，CCC證書持有人/國內製造商或其指定銷售實體為產品投放市場的責任方；由於貨物為國內貨物，不存在境外境內進口商的概念。中國出口製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司。中國沒有與蒙古在目的國實際依賴本地進口商/代表進行合格文件提交及清關相對應的法定義務；這是出口商須通過其蒙古進口商滿足的目的地市場要求。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese domestic equivalent; this is a Mongolian destination-market import/representation requirement

gap.en: The gap is structural and logistical rather than technical: （1） Local importer/representative — the Chinese exporter must engage an in-country Mongolian importer or representative to clear customs, present MASM conformity documentation, and carry any energy-label/product-information obligations; （2） Landlocked logistics — shipments move by rail/road across the China–Mongolia land border, affecting lead time, transport mode selection, and Incoterms/documentation planning; （3） Mongolian-language documentation — product information, labels, and safety notices must be available in Mongolian as required for the market and customs; （4） Customs/duties — the importer handles import duties and VAT. None of these is satisfied by Chinese CCC or domestic arrangements; they must be set up specifically for the Mongolian market via the importer.
gap.zh: 差距为结构性和物流性，而非技术性：（1）本地进口商/代表——中国出口商须聘用境内蒙古进口商或代表办理清关、提交MASM合格文件，并承担任何能效标签/产品信息义务；（2）内陆物流——货物经铁路/公路跨越中蒙陆地边界运输，影响交期、运输方式选择及贸易术语/文件规划；（3）蒙古语文件——产品信息、标签及安全提示须按市场和海关要求以蒙古语提供；（4）海关/关税——进口商处理进口关税和增值税。上述均不能由中国CCC或国内安排满足；须专门为蒙古市场通过进口商设立。
gap.zht: 差距為結構性和物流性，而非技術性：（1）本地進口商/代表——中國出口商須聘用境內蒙古進口商或代表辦理清關、提交MASM合格文件，並承擔任何能效標籤/產品資訊義務；（2）內陸物流——貨物經鐵路/公路跨越中蒙陸地邊界運輸，影響交期、運輸方式選擇及貿易術語/文件規劃；（3）蒙古語文件——產品資訊、標籤及安全提示須按市場和海關要求以蒙古語提供；（4）海關/關稅——進口商處理進口關稅和增值稅。上述均不能由中國CCC或國內安排滿足；須專門為蒙古市場通過進口商設立。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — an in-country importer/representative is required to clear customs and place imported appliances on the Mongolian market; land-border rail/road entry applies （landlocked）
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — Chinese domestic market has no foreign in-country importer concept; commercial distributor arrangements only for exports

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Mongolian in-country importer/representative is the practical gate for customs clearance, MASM conformity presentation, and product-information/labelling for imported refrigerators. As Mongolia is landlocked, goods enter by rail/road from China, shaping logistics and lead times. This obligation is destination-specific and is not covered by Chinese CCC or domestic arrangements; the exporter must set it up through its Mongolian importer, including Mongolian-language documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古境内进口商/代表是进口电冰箱清关、MASM合格文件提交及产品信息/标识的实际门槛。由于蒙古为内陆国，货物经铁路/公路从中国入境，影响物流和交期。该义务为目的地特定，不被中国CCC或国内安排涵盖；出口商须通过其蒙古进口商设立，包括蒙古语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古境內進口商/代表是進口電冰箱清關、MASM合格文件提交及產品資訊/標識的實際門檻。由於蒙古為內陸國，貨物經鐵路/公路從中國入境，影響物流和交期。該義務為目的地特定，不被中國CCC或國內安排涵蓋；出口商須通過其蒙古進口商設立，包括蒙古語文件。
